name: Quanxi (Deadly Target)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

Sit… and I mean RIGHT NOW.

Join the Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

You’re officially classified as a fourth-rate, maybe third-rate devil hunter, if you’re lucky, certainly a novice in the field compared to some of your peers. However, Public Safety has just given you a high priority, classified mission to assassinate or otherwise neutralize a Hybrid, one of the seven Weapons, or so you’ve been told, they aren’t very specific about the job. All they’ve given you is a time and a place, as well as a price that would set you up for life if you prove successful. With no choice to refuse, you set out on the job, unaware just how out of your depth you are when you finally encounter the legendary (and naked) Quanxi and her harem of devils and fiends.

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

This is another bot that was voted for in my Discord server! I’m glad it was because I haven’t done a Quanxi bot in FOREVER and because this is an intriguing scenario I haven’t really done with any of my other bots. I’m not going to get into the “why is your Quanxi bot AnyPOV when she’s canonically lesbian” because I really just don’t care. Anyone can use this fictional bot about a fictional character on an AI chatbot website. It’s really not that deep. Anyway, join the server to vote on future bots and have fun!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
